comment: Layer C integration cases applicable to the lax_friedrichs_flux_cubed_sphere_xi (and its η-direction sibling) rules. Each case names a manifest path (relative to this cases.json) plus the dispatcher kind. Stubs return SKIP with the manifest's skip_reason. Active cases run only with ESD_RUN_INTEGRATION=1 — the cubed-sphere advection scaffold time-steps the imperative `flux_1d` ArrayOp (the LF wrapper this rule mirrors) and reports L∞ error against the analytic transported field after one revolution. The Williamson manifest exercises both ξ and η LF flux paths inside the dimensional split; the η rule defers to this fixture rather than carrying its own.
